title: Arc
description: One arc / quest-thread. DERIVED from greater_arcs.json arcs[] (SNG-BATCH-9 build-step-1). Arcs are STRUCTURAL, not prose few-shot: a tension between two dispositions or factions + hinge NPCs + a fork (ifIgnored vs ifEngaged). `required` is the shape all 5 authored greater-arcs share. generate('arc', ctx) authors a LOCAL thread from an active tension in the scene — smaller scale, local hinge NPCs — validating against this same shape; the world-tick (SNG-021, Phase 2) advances it offscreen. `scale` gains 'local' for generated threads. connectsTo/convergenceNote/claimedNodes are optional (a fresh local feud may connect to nothing; repair defaults connectsTo to []).

schemaVersion.description: present on standalone generated arc records; authored arcs inherit greater_arcs.json's file-level version as array elements

id.description: stable slug; generated arcs mint via the SNG-019 resolver

scale.description: 'local' = a generated quest-thread; 'regional'/'world' = authored greater arcs

pressure.description: the burn rate / weight of the arc (e.g. 'slow-building', 'medium', 'the deep clock')

tendency.description: the tension: which direction it pulls untended — the two dispositions/factions in conflict

crossesRegions.description: where it plays; a local thread may name a single place

hingeNpcs.description: the people the arc turns on; generated arcs name local NPCs (authored or generated)

ifIgnored.description: what happens if the player never engages — the untended drift

ifEngaged.description: what a player who leans in can change — the fork's other branch

connectsTo.description: other arc ids this feeds; a generated local face may connect up to a greater arc where apt

stages.description: optional ordered beats the arc moves through as it advances. Authored greater-arcs use the OBJECT form (SNG-204): each stage names what its advance makes MORE LIKELY (pressureOnAdvance) — the lore-bounded input the wake generator reasons from. A bare string is still accepted for a simple generated thread.

publicFace.description: what the world visibly shows at this stage

pressureOnAdvance.description: SNG-204: what advancing through this stage makes MORE LIKELY — the wake generator's lore-bounded input
